## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7fc27be867bc1ae651b345d2f825d0ac8d796615c022747306e87bd3ff0d1fc8)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'amzn-codewhisperer-streaming-client' @ 99.0.1 (crates.io) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
